mapper.select: SELECT write_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND information_type = '模型信息预览' and delete_status = 1

SELECT supp.data_content_description dataContentDescription, info.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, info.audit_point_name auditPointName, info.audit_model_number auditModelNumber, info.audit_model_name auditModelName, info.audit_business_logic auditBusinessLogic, info.subordinate_to_system subordinateToSystem, info.model_code modelCode, info.is_online AS is_online, COALESCE( model."model_owner", model.dock_people ) AS model_owner, COALESCE( model."model_owner_depy", model.dock_deputy ) AS model_owner_depy, info.quality_rating, info.model_code_file_id, info."running_mode", info."off_model_library" offModelLibrary, info."is_share" isShare FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_info AS info LEFT JOIN hpeapm."spl_model_type" model ON info."audit_model_number" = model."audit_model_number" LEFT JOIN (SELECT audit_model_number, STRING_AGG(c.name, ',') data_content_description FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support_v2 c WHERE 1 = 1 AND c.audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND c.isdel = 1) supp ON info.audit_model_number = supp.audit_model_number WHERE 1 = 1 AND info.audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
select * from hpeapm.audit_elements_online_model where 1 = 1 AND audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' and is_deleted = 0

SELECT b.data_content_description dataContentDescription, a.* FROM ( SELECT _abc.auditPointNumber AS auditPointNumber, _abc.auditPointName AS auditPointName, _abc.auditModelNumber AS auditModelNumber, _abc.auditModelName AS auditModelName, _abc.dockPeople AS dockPeople, _abc.dockDepartment AS dockDepartment, _abc.primaryBusinessProcess AS primaryBusinessProcess, _abc.secondaryBusinessProcess AS secondaryBusinessProcess, _abc.auditBusinessLogic, _abc.subordinateToSystem, _abc.modelCode, _abc.isOnline, _abc.model_code_file_id modelCodeFileId, _abc.quality_rating qualityRating, ba.service_ownership_system serviceOwnershipSystem, ba.model_running_frequency modelRunningFrequency, ba.number_units_covered numberUnitsCovered, ba.number_of_provincial numberOfProvincial, ba.number_professional_institutions numberProfessionalInstitutions, ba.whether_cured_system whetherCuredSystem, ba.model_online_time modelOnlineTime, ba.sources_audit_practice sourcesAuditPractice, ba.ascription_special ascriptionSpecial, ba.online_remarks onlineRemarks, mo.data_content_description dataContentDescription, mo.data_access_time accessTime, _abc.remark AS remark, _abc.typeOfInformation, _abc.detailedTime, _abc.runningMode, CASE WHEN kk."type" IS NULL AND _abc.isOnline IS NOT NULL AND _abc.isOnline='0' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END AS canSubmit FROM ( SELECT b.audit_business_logic AS auditBusinessLogic, b.subordinate_to_system AS subordinateToSystem, b.model_code AS modelCode, b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark remark, b.is_online as isOnline, b.model_code_file_id as model_code_file_id, b.quality_rating as quality_rating, a.type_of_information as typeOfInformation, a.detailed_time AS detailedTime, b.running_mode as runningMode FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, information_type, type_of_information, detailed_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE delete_status = '1'
AND dock_people = '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND dock_department like like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%'
AND information_type =like '%'||#{informationType}||'%'
AND "is_import" = '%'||#{isImport}||'%' ) a JOIN ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, audit_point_number, remark remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, audit_business_logic, subordinate_to_system, model_code, is_online, model_code_file_id, quality_rating, running_mode FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
and offline!='1'
/*AND is_online='1'*/
AND primary_business_process like '%'||like '%'||#{primaryBusinessProcess}||'%'||'%'
and secondary_business_process like '%'||like '%'||#{secondaryBusinessProcess}||'%'||'%'
and audit_point_number like '%'||like '%'||#{auditPointNumber}||'%'||'%'
and audit_point_name like '%'||like '%'||#{auditPointName}||'%'||'%'
and audit_model_number like '%'||like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'||'%'
and audit_model_name like '%'||like '%'||#{auditModelName}||'%'||'%'
) b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ORDER BY detailedTime DESC LIMIT like '%'||#{size}||'%' OFFSET like '%'||#{page}||'%' ) _abc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT audit_model_number, service_ownership_system, model_running_frequency, number_units_covered, number_of_provincial, number_professional_institutions, whether_cured_system, model_online_time, sources_audit_practice, ascription_special, online_remarks FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_online_model WHERE is_deleted = 0 ) ba ON _abc.auditModelNumber = ba.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN ( SELECT audit_model_number, STRING_AGG(data_content_description, ',') data_content_description,MIN(data_access_time) data_access_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support WHERE isdel = 1 GROUP BY audit_model_number ) mo ON ba.audit_model_number = mo.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN (SELECT examine_type AS "type", audit_model_number AS audit_model_number FROM hpeapm."spl_business_examine" WHERE is_complete = '0') kk ON _abc.auditModelNumber = kk.audit_model_number ) a left join ( SELECT audit_model_number, STRING_AGG(c.name, ',') data_content_description FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support_v2 c WHERE 1 = 1 AND c.isdel = 1 GROUP BY audit_model_number ) b on a.auditModelNumber=b.audit_model_number WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY a.detailedTime DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT _abc.auditModelNumber) as result FROM ( SELECT b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.primary_business_process as primaryBusinessProcess, b.secondary_business_process as secondaryBusinessProcess, b.audit_business_logic AS auditBusinessLogic, b.subordinate_to_system AS subordinateToSystem, b.model_code AS modelCode, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department as dockDepartment, a.type_of_information typeOfInformation, b.existing_data_of_model as existing_data_of_model, support_remark as remark, detailed_time as detailedTime FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, type_of_information, detailed_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE information_type = '模型信息预览' AND delete_status = '1'
AND dock_people = '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND dock_department like like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%'
AND information_type =like '%'||#{informationType}||'%'
AND "is_import" = '%'||#{isImport}||'%' )a JOIN( SELECT audit_business_logic, subordinate_to_system, model_code, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, audit_point_number, audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, existing_data_of_model, support_remark FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" where 1=1
and offline!='1'
/* AND is_online='1'*/
AND primary_business_process = '%'||#{primaryBusinessProcess}||'%'
AND secondary_business_process = '%'||#{secondaryBusinessProcess}||'%'
and audit_point_number like '%'||like '%'||#{auditPointNumber}||'%'||'%'
and audit_point_name like '%'||like '%'||#{auditPointName}||'%'||'%'
and audit_model_number like '%'||like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'||'%'
and audit_model_name like '%'||like '%'||#{auditModelName}||'%'||'%'
)b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number )_abc LEFT JOIN( SELECT audit_model_number, service_ownership_system serviceOwnershipSystem, model_running_frequency modelRunningFrequency, number_units_covered numberUnitsCovered, number_of_provincial numberOfProvincial, number_professional_institutions numberProfessionalInstitutions, whether_cured_system whetherCuredSystem, model_online_time modelOnlineTime, sources_audit_practice sourcesAuditPractice, ascription_special ascriptionSpecial, online_remarks onlineRemarks FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_online_model" WHERE is_deleted = 0 )me ON _abc.auditModelNumber = me.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN ( SELECT audit_model_number, STRING_AGG(data_content_description, ',') data_content_description,MIN(data_access_time) data_access_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support WHERE isdel = 1 GROUP BY audit_model_number ) supp ON _abc.auditModelNumber = supp.audit_model_number )a where 1=1
mapper.insert:
insert into hpeapm.audit_elements_online_model
service_ownership_system, model_running_frequency, number_units_covered, number_of_provincial,
number_professional_institutions,
whether_cured_system, model_online_time, sources_audit_practice, ascription_special, online_remarks, is_deleted, audit_model_number
like '%'||#{serviceOwnershipSystem}||'%', like '%'||#{modelRunningFrequency}||'%', like '%'||#{numberUnitsCovered}||'%', like '%'||#{numberOfProvincial}||'%',
like '%'||#{numberProfessionalInstitutions}||'%',
like '%'||#{whetherCuredSystem}||'%', like '%'||#{modelOnlineTime}||'%', like '%'||#{sourcesAuditPractice}||'%', like '%'||#{ascriptionSpecial}||'%', like '%'||#{onlineRemarks}||'%', like '%'||#{isDeleted}||'%', like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_online_model
service_ownership_system=like '%'||#{serviceOwnershipSystem}||'%',
model_running_frequency=like '%'||#{modelRunningFrequency}||'%',
number_units_covered=like '%'||#{numberUnitsCovered}||'%',
number_of_provincial=like '%'||#{numberOfProvincial}||'%',
number_professional_institutions=like '%'||#{numberProfessionalInstitutions}||'%',
whether_cured_system=like '%'||#{whetherCuredSystem}||'%',
model_online_time=like '%'||#{modelOnlineTime}||'%',
sources_audit_practice=like '%'||#{sourcesAuditPractice}||'%',
ascription_special=like '%'||#{ascriptionSpecial}||'%',
online_remarks=like '%'||#{onlineRemarks}||'%',
is_deleted=like '%'||#{isDeleted}||'%'
where audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_online_model set is_deleted = 1 where audit_model_number = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select:
SELECT b.data_content_description dataContentDescription, a.*, c.*, d.* FROM ( SELECT _abc.auditPointNumber AS auditPointNumber, _abc.auditPointName AS auditPointName, _abc.auditModelNumber AS auditModelNumber, _abc.auditModelName AS auditModelName, _abc.dockPeople AS dockPeople, _abc.dockDepartment AS dockDepartment, _abc.primaryBusinessProcess AS primaryBusinessProcess, _abc.secondaryBusinessProcess AS secondaryBusinessProcess, _abc.auditBusinessLogic, _abc.subordinateToSystem, _abc.running_mode as runningMode, _abc.quality_rating AS qualityRating, ba.service_ownership_system serviceOwnershipSystem, ba.model_running_frequency modelRunningFrequency, ba.number_units_covered numberUnitsCovered, ba.number_of_provincial numberOfProvincial, ba.number_professional_institutions numberProfessionalInstitutions, ba.whether_cured_system AS whetherCuredSystem, ba.model_online_time modelOnlineTime, ba.sources_audit_practice sourcesAuditPractice, ba.ascription_special ascriptionSpecial, ba.online_remarks onlineRemarks, mo.data_content_description dataContentDescription, mo.data_access_time accessTime, _abc.remark AS remark, _abc.typeOfInformation, _abc.detailedTime FROM ( SELECT b.audit_business_logic AS auditBusinessLogic, b.subordinate_to_system AS subordinateToSystem, b.model_code AS modelCode, b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark remark, b.running_mode, b.quality_rating, a.type_of_information as typeOfInformation, a.detailed_time AS detailedTime FROM ( SELECT distinct audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, information_type, type_of_information, detailed_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE delete_status = '1' AND information_type ='模型信息预览'
AND dock_people = '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND dock_department like like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%'
AND information_type =like '%'||#{informationType}||'%'
AND "is_import" = '%'||#{isImport}||'%' ) a JOIN ( SELECT distinct audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, audit_point_number, remark remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, audit_business_logic, subordinate_to_system, model_code, running_mode, quality_rating FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
and offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{primaryBusinessProcess}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
and secondary_business_process like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{secondaryBusinessProcess}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
and audit_point_number like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{auditPointNumber}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
and audit_point_name like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{auditPointName}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
and audit_model_number like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
and audit_model_name like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{auditModelName}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
) b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ORDER BY detailedTime DESC ) _abc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT distinct audit_model_number, service_ownership_system, model_running_frequency, number_units_covered, number_of_provincial, number_professional_institutions, whether_cured_system, model_online_time, sources_audit_practice, ascription_special, online_remarks FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_online_model WHERE is_deleted = 0 ) ba ON _abc.auditModelNumber = ba.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN ( SELECT audit_model_number, STRING_AGG( data_content_description, ',' ) data_content_description,MIN(data_access_time) data_access_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support WHERE isdel = 1 GROUP BY audit_model_number ) mo ON ba.audit_model_number = mo.audit_model_number ) a left join ( SELECT audit_model_number, STRING_AGG(c.name, ',') data_content_description FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support_v2 c WHERE 1 = 1 AND c.isdel = 1 GROUP BY audit_model_number ) b on a.auditModelNumber=b.audit_model_number left join ( SELECT audit_model_number, problem_detail_description problemDetailDescriptionSj, problem_summary AS problemSummarySj, audit_period AS auditPeriodSj, involved_unit AS involvedUnitSj, audit_project AS auditProjectSj FROM hpeapm."audit_element_case" a WHERE a."type" = '1' and a.is_del=0 ORDER BY a."type", "order" ) c on a.auditModelNumber=c.audit_model_number left join ( SELECT audit_model_number, problem_detail_description problemDetailDescriptionYs, problem_summary AS problemSummaryYs, audit_period AS auditPeriodYs, involved_unit AS involvedUnitYs, audit_project AS auditProjectYs FROM hpeapm."audit_element_case" a WHERE a."type" = '2' and a.is_del=0 ORDER BY a."type", "order" ) d on a.auditModelNumber=d.audit_model_number WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY a.detailedTime DESC

SELECT * FROM "hpeapm"."audit_element_case" WHERE 1 = 1 and is_del=0 AND audit_model_number IN
like '%'||#{item}||'%'
ORDER BY "order"
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm."audit_element_case" a SET a."is_del" = '1' WHERE a."audit_model_number" = '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
and a."type" = '%'||#{type}||'%'
mapper.insert:
insert into hpeapm.audit_element_case(problem_detail_description, problem_summary, audit_period, involved_unit, audit_project, type, "order", audit_model_number) values
like '%'||#{case.problemDetailDescription}||'%', like '%'||#{case.problemSummary}||'%', like '%'||#{case.auditPeriod}||'%', like '%'||#{case.involvedUnit}||'%', like '%'||#{case.auditProject}||'%', like '%'||#{case.type}||'%', like '%'||#{case.order}||'%', like '%'||#{case.auditModelNumber}||'%'
